title: SIL Interiors Bamboo Mesh Food Cover
features: A traditional bamboo inspired mesh food cover.
description: Update your kitchen decor with this amazing bamboo mesh food cover from Sil Interiors. Made with high quality materials, this traditional food cover features a bamboo design and a mesh covering, the perfect way to keep pesky insects away from your delicious food items! Simply roll the cover over your food and secure it in place to ensure your food is kept fresh all day long. The perfect new home gift idea or addition to your kitchen, treat yourself to this mesh food cover as a hassle free accessory that will add a natural feel to your home.
